examples: If the tariff were lifted and unprocessed cashew were sold at world market prices, more farmers could profit by growing cashews.
Kernland imposes a high tariff on the export of unprocessed cashew nuts in order to ensure that the nuts are sold to domestic processing plants.
Cashew butter on toast -actually, not any more.
Tanzania's exports are dominated by products whose price is weak - coffee, tea, cashew nuts and cotton.
Coups can be a lucrative business, and although its main export is cashew nuts, Guinea-Bissau offers tempting opportunities.
